---
name: Scoring model proposal
about: Suggest a scoring, weighting, or production-gate improvement
title: "[Scoring]: "
labels: scoring

---

## What should change?

Describe the proposed scoring, weighting, finding, warning, or production-gate change.

## Why does it matter?

Explain the production AI risk, control, or workflow this improves.

## Suggested behavior

Describe the expected score, finding, warning, or production gate behavior.

## Compatibility impact

Could this change alter existing scores, JSON output, or CI gates?

## Example

Use a synthetic example only. Do not include confidential or employer-specific workflows.
